channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles selling snow collected from NFC divisional win
item.description: The snow was collected, carefully preserved and authenticated by the grounds crew to allow fans to own a genuine piece of Eagles history, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, NewsNation

item.title: Raiders hire Bucs assistant general manager John Spytek as their GM, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — The Las Vegas Raiders hired Tampa Bay Buccaneers assistant general manager John Spytek to be their GM, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Wednesday. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the hire has not been announced.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pro Picks: Sticking with the preseason prediction of an Eagles-Chiefs Super Bowl rematch
item.description: Familiar foes are facing off in the conference championship games in the NFL playoffs. Patrick Mahomes and the two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs take on Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills for the fourth time in the past five postseasons.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mike Tirico will be lead play-by-play announcer when NBC begins its NBA coverage next season
item.description: Mike Tirico has been officially named as NBC's lead play-by-play announcer when it begins its coverage of the NBA next season. The move is not a surprise, since many expected that to happen when NBC agreed to an 11-year contract with the NBA last summer.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cubs, WGN were early Chicago connections for Ben Johnson
item.description: CHICAGO — Like so many Cubs fans around the country, Ben Johnson also ran inside to watch Cubs baseball on WGN after school. In Johnson's highly-anticipated introductory press conference, he mentioned that he and his family go to a Cubs game once a year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Lions defensive coordinator Aaron Glenn agrees to terms with Jets to be head coach, AP source says
item.description: Aaron Glenn is back where his NFL journey began nearly 31 years ago. He was a game-changing cornerback for the New York Jets then. Now he's tasked with helping turn around the fortunes of the franchise.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rangers goalie Igor Shesterkin trades blows with Senators star as game descends into chaos
item.description: New York Rangers superstar goalie Igor Shesterkin charged straight into a melee during the third period of the Rangers' 5-0 win over the Ottawa Senators on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City sent to brink of Champions League exit by PSG. Real Madrid routs Salzburg to advance
item.description: Manchester City is on the brink of a humiliating Champions League exit after a stunning 4-2 loss to Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tony La Russa’s celebrity concert launches new animal-rescue project after bitter ARF breakup
item.description: This Saturday, Tony La Russa and his family will revive a tradition of fundraising for animal rescue efforts by hosting a star-studded concert that also features a tribute to the late Oakland A’s legend Rickey Henderson.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Winter storm causes rescheduling of NBA and college games across the South
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The NBA and multiple college basketball conferences postponed games in response to winter weather that broke snowfall records in some southern states and coated others with a mix of snow and ice.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: High school boys soccer rankings, Jan. 22, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 10
item.description: Upset losses lead to big shakeup as Bellarmine, Clayton Valley, Dougherty Valley, Menlo-Atherton, Serra elevate into top five
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina to host No. 5 LSU a day later than scheduled after winter weather in the South
item.description: The Southeastern Conference has postponed Thursday night's women's basketball game between No. 5 LSU and No. 2 South Carolina in Columbia, South Carolina, until Friday because of winter weather.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Spurs-Pacers games in Paris have a notable absence, with Gregg Popovich recovering at home
item.description: PARIS (AP) — Indiana's Rick Carlisle has coached more games against San Antonio's Gregg Popovich than anyone else. They've had 87 head-to-head matchups, including playoffs. Thursday was supposed to be No. 88.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trial postponed for Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers in domestic case
item.description: New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday on domestic violence charges.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Bucs OC Liam Coen withdraws from consideration for Jaguars' coaching job, AP source says
item.description: Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen is no longer a candidate to be Jacksonville's next head coach.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG and ROB MAADDI AP Sports Writers, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Phillies general manager Ruben Amaro Jr. will launch a hitting competition
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Sluggball, a 4-on-4 baseball competition co-founded by former Philadelphia Phillies general manager Ruben Amaro Jr., is expected to debut in May and tour minor league stadiums this season. Sluggball focuses entirely on situational hitting, with no fielding or running required.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open: American player Ben Shelton criticizes TV interviewers at tournament
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis player Ben Shelton criticized on Wednesday some of the questions and comments made by post-match TV interviewers at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coveted rookie card of Pirates star Paul Skenes pulled by young collector after offer from MLB team
item.description: Pirates ace Paul Skenes, one of the top prospects entering last season, wore an MLB debut patch on his uniform during his first big league game in May 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agree to a multiyear contract extension after a 14-win season
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agreed to terms on a multiyear contract extension on Tuesday, following a 14-3 regular season that defied external widespread preseason projections of at least a losing record if not a last-place finish in the NFC North.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes addresses flopping and referee favoritism allegations after outrage over penalties
item.description: Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes addressed fan backlash over questionable penalties called against his opponents and his attempt to draw a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
